summary: Iter18: Company / Employer third-persona feature fully verified — both Path A (self-register → super_admin approval provisions Company + company_admin) and Path B (super_admin POST /api/companies with admin_phone → returns temp_pin, pin_must_change=true, admin can log in) work correctly. Backend: 21/21 pytest cases passed (POST /api/auth/company-register happy path + validation matrix, PATCH /api/company-requests/{id} approval provisions company/user/hash matches submitted PIN, reject leaves DB clean, POST /api/companies allots temp PIN, duplicate admin_phone → 409, no admin_phone → no admin created). Frontend: E2E via Playwright at the public preview URL — landing shows all three CTAs (Admin, Company sign in / register, Employee), company-login screen renders every required testID (identifier, PIN, submit, register-link, forgot-pin), company-register 3-step wizard walks through firm → contact → PIN → cr-done, and cr-error surfaces for blank Firm name, bad email, and trivial PIN '111111'. The cr-go-signin button routes back to /company-login. Real super admin PIN was NEVER touched — used a throwaway super_admin doc seeded via pymongo. All test artefacts (throwaway SA, ITER18 companies/requests/users, E2E UI-submitted request) cleaned up from Mongo.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing web deprecation warnings carried over from prior iterations — non-blocking.

action_items: No blocking action items. Company persona feature is production-ready per the tested contract.

OPTIONAL (unchanged, carried from iter_17): users.email unique index is not sparse; two phone-only signups with no email still collide with DuplicateKeyError. Out of scope for this iter but flagged again for hygiene.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1643-1690 — Approval provisioning is not atomic: db.companies.insert_one runs before db.users.insert_one. If the users insert fails (e.g. duplicate email/phone raised between the pre-check on line 1645 and insert on line 1686), the company row is orphaned. Consider wrapping in a MongoDB transaction OR compensating with a delete of company on user-insert failure.

server.py:1943-1990 (Path B) — Similar non-atomic pattern: db.companies.insert_one commits before the admin user is created; a race on the admin_email uniqueness check (lines 1954-1957) can leave a company without its admin. Same compensation guidance.

company-register.tsx:52 — mobile validation is 'digits ≥ 10' but backend normaliser accepts +91 + 10 digits; UI treats '9876543210' (no +91) as valid and backend re-normalises. Works today, but consider showing the normalised form back so the user sees what will be saved.
company-login.tsx:41-61 — no rate-limit / lockout feedback in UI when backend returns 429; user sees the generic error string. Consider surfacing lockout minutes explicitly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 UI checkpoints: landing 3-CTA, company-login testIDs, register wizard 3 steps, 3 validation errors, cr-done→signin routing)

seed_data_creation: Created and DELETED during this run: (a) throwaway super_admin 'throwaway_sa_iter18_<tag>@example.com' — deleted, (b) ~5 ITER18-tagged company_requests — deleted, (c) 2 ITER18 provisioned companies + their company_admin users — deleted, (d) UI-submitted 'E2E Iter18 Firm' company_request with owner 'e2e_iter18_ui@example.com' / phone +919876500042 — deleted. Final DB state verified 0 residuals. Real super admin doc snapshot BEFORE and AFTER identical: {pin_must_change:true, pin_fail_count:0, pin_locked_until:null, pin_hash unchanged}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company / Employer persona (Path A self-register + Path B allot-credentials) is fully verified end-to-end. Reusable regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_company_persona_iter18.py. Uses a throwaway pymongo-seeded super_admin (never touches the real one). Uses TAG='ITER18_<random>' for all seed data — cleanup is guaranteed by module-scoped fixture teardown. Note: /api/auth/company-register triggers Resend email delivery to sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com; each successful registration in tests will produce one real email — main agent may want to monkeypatch _try_send_admin_email for silent test runs going forward (mocked_apis flagged in the review request). testIDs on frontend all match the review spec exactly.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Two non-blocking architectural comments: (1) non-atomic provisioning between companies+users inserts in both Path A approval and Path B create; (2) UI does not surface 429 lockout time. Both are hardening items, not defects.
